questions.question: In 1999, approximately how many square miles of farmland did the three MWRD properties (the METROGRO Farm) encompass?
About how many miles east of Denver are the biosolids transported to the MWRD property near Deer Trail?
What is the primary water-supply aquifer in the study area?
The transfer of treated water from which Superfund site raised public concern about biosolids radioactivity?
Which trace elements were the crops monitored for near Deer Trail?
In one or two sentences, what is this document and what does it present?
questions.gold: A U.S. Geological Survey data report presenting biosolids, crop, ground-water, and streambed-sediment chemical data for the year 2000 from an expanded monitoring program at a biosolids-application area near Deer Trail, Colorado, run by the USGS in cooperation with the Metro Wastewater Reclamation District (MWRD) and the North Kiowa Bijou Groundwater Management District.

questions.question: What is the stated meaning of the abbreviation BMP in the document?
questions.gold: below the measuring point of the well casing
